name: Northking Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Northking Information Technology Co., Ltd. provides information technology outsourcing (ITO) and business process outsourcing (BPO) services to financial institutions in China and internationally. The company's ITO service offers product platforms and tools, channel class solution, Internet finance solutions, image process solutions, test class solutions, financial institution business management and business decision systems, business solutions, and financial institution operational risk and compliance management solutions, as well as human resources outsourcing services. It also offers BPO services related to credit card and loan credit verification, data entry, business processing, business marketing, cash business, lobby service, file outsourcing, bank card business, e-commerce operation, financial sharing processing, call service processing, human resources outsourcing, insurance business, process banking business centralized processing, and e-banking auxiliary processing. The company is headquartered in Beijing, China.
